name: Jordan
html: deploying purrs…
css: .w{width:100%;height:100%;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 40%,#2b2b40,#15151f);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6%;font-family:system-ui}.cat{position:relative;width:46%;aspect-ratio:1/.9}.ear{position:absolute;top:-14%;width:0;height:0;border-left:18px solid transparent;border-right:18px solid transparent;border-bottom:30px solid #888}.ear.l{left:8%;transform:rotate(-12deg)}.ear.r{right:8%;transform:rotate(12deg)}.face{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#999;border-radius:48% 48% 45% 45%}.eye{position:absolute;top:38%;width:14%;aspect-ratio:1/2;background:#1a1a1a;border-radius:50%;animation:blink 4s infinite}.eye.l{left:26%}.eye.r{right:26%}.nose{position:absolute;top:54%;left:46%;width:9%;aspect-ratio:1/.7;background:#f7a;border-radius:50%}.wh{position:absolute;top:55%;height:1px;width:28%;background:#ddd}.w1{left:-22%}.w2{right:-22%}.lbl{color:#bbb;font-size:clamp(.5rem,2.2vw,.85rem);letter-spacing:.1em}@keyframes blink{0%,92%,100%{transform:scaleY(1)}96%{transform:scaleY(.1)}}
tagline: I keep pipelines AND cats alive. 99.9% uptime on both.
